JavaScript test scripts for assertions, loops, logic, object properties, and exception handling.

## Folders
- **[12.01](12.01/README.md)**: JavaScript test files for various scenarios including assertions, empty blocks, and variable assignments.
- **[12.02](12.02/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for variable verification, initialization, and type checking.
- **[12.03](12.03/README.md)**: JavaScript test functions and a script for string equality assertion.
- **[12.04](12.04/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for evaluating arithmetic, logical operations, and variable initialization.
- **[12.05](12.05/README.md)**: JavaScript test functions for conditional logic, assertions, and string equality in the JerryScript test suite.
- **[12.06](12.06/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for `do-while` loops, loop logic, counter operations, and property iteration.
- **[12.07](12.07/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for verifying loop, conditional logic, and object property iteration.
- **[12.08](12.08/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for iterating over object properties, nested loops, and verifying sum calculations.
- **[12.09](12.09/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for object creation, bitwise operations, function behavior, and return values.
- **[12.10](12.10/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for the `with` statement and mathematical functions like cosine and `Math.abs`.
- **[12.11](12.11/README.md)**: Test scripts for verifying various switch-case behaviors in JavaScript.
- **[12.12](12.12/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for labeled loops, break, and continue statements in various structures.
- **[12.13](12.13/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for exception handling using try-catch blocks and function call chains.
- **[12.14](12.14/README.md)**: Test scripts for try-catch and try-finally exception handling in JavaScript.
